pdf_metadata.title: Technical Advisory T5140.34 Use and Inspection of Adhesive Anchors in Federal-Aid Projects
pdf_metadata.author: FHWA
pdf_metadata.creator: Acrobat PDFMaker 11 for Word

bibliographic_resolution.evidence: The first page prints January 16, 2018. PDF creation and modification timestamps are retained only as file provenance.

rights.rights_basis: The advisory identifies FHWA as author and is hosted on the official FHWA domain; United States federal works are not subject to domestic copyright under 17 U.S.C. 105.
rights.scope: FHWA-authored failure and governance prose only
rights.component_policy: Exclude incorporated standards and quotations, certification-program and organization marks, figures, tables, product or material detail, and any component with third-party or uncertain authorship.

audit.visual_review: all 4 rendered physical pages manually inspected in one ordered contact sheet

accepted_scope_context.source_wording_boundary: The PDF itself says ceiling panel collapse and does not supply casualty details. The corpus states that distinction explicitly.
